'''zhachugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabaddi|kabaddi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabaddi|kabaddi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhachugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchigith|zhæchigith]] || [[word:zhæchigij|zhæchigij]] || [[word:zhæchigish|zhæchigish]] || [[word:zhæchigi|zhæchigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachuchuguth|zhachuchuguth]] || [[word:zhachuchuguj|zhachuchuguj]] || [[word:zhachuchugush|zhachuchugush]] || [[word:zhachuchugu|zhachuchugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachuguth|zhachuguth]] || [[word:zhachuguj|zhachuguj]] || [[word:zhachugush|zhachugush]] || [[word:zhachugu|zhachugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachufgufth|zhachufgufth]] || [[word:zhachufgufj|zhachufgufj]] || [[word:zhachufgufsh|zhachufgufsh]] || [[word:zhachufguf|zhachufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachuguthu|zhachuguthu]] || [[word:zhachuguju|zhachuguju]] || [[word:zhachugushu|zhachugushu]] || [[word:zhachuguku|zhachuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachuguth|zhachuguth]] || [[word:zhachuguj|zhachuguj]] || [[word:zhachugush|zhachugush]] || [[word:zhachugu|zhachugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachuguthul|zhachuguthul]] || [[word:zhachugujul|zhachugujul]] || [[word:zhachugushul|zhachugushul]] || [[word:zhachugukul|zhachugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachuguuthuthu|zhachuguuthuthu]] || [[word:zhachuguujuju|zhachuguujuju]] || [[word:zhachuguushushu|zhachuguushushu]] || [[word:zhachuguuku|zhachuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachuguthun|zhachuguthun]] || [[word:zhachugujun|zhachugujun]] || [[word:zhachugushun|zhachugushun]] || [[word:zhachugukun|zhachugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachuguthuoro|zhachuguthuoro]] || [[word:zhachugujuoro|zhachugujuoro]] || [[word:zhachugushuoro|zhachugushuoro]] || [[word:zhachugukuoro|zhachugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
